{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/101492831?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Finder16/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Finder16/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Finder16/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Finder16/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Finder16", "id": 101492831, "login": "Finder16", "node_id": "U_kgDOBgyoXw", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Finder16/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Finder16/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Finder16/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Finder16/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Finder16/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Finder16", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2025-67726", "cvss": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-400", "name": "Uncontrolled Resource Consumption"}], "description": "## Summary

The `_parseparam` function in Tornado's `httputil.py` is used to parse specific HTTP header values, such as those in `multipart/form-data`. This function uses an inefficient algorithm that repeatedly calls `string.count()` within a nested loop while processing quoted semicolons (e.g., `param=";"`).

As a result, if an attacker sends a request with a large number of maliciously crafted parameters in a `Content-Disposition` header, the server's CPU usage increases quadratically (O(n²)) during parsing. Due to Tornado's single event loop architecture, a single malicious request can cause the entire server to become unresponsive for an extended period, leading to a Denial of Service (DoS).

**Severity: High**", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00378, "percentile": 0.29886}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-jhmp-mqwm-3gq8", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-20T18:57:54Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jhmp-mqwm-3gq8", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-jhmp-mqwm-3gq8"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2025-67726"}], "nvd_published_at": "2025-12-12T07:15:44Z", "published_at": "2026-07-20T18:57:54Z", "references": ["https://github.com/tornadoweb/tornado/security/advisories/GHSA-jhmp-mqwm-3gq8", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-67726", "https://github.com/tornadoweb/tornado/commit/771472cfdaeebc0d89a9cc46e249f8891a6b29cd", "https://github.com/pypa/advisory-database/tree/main/vulns/tornado/PYSEC-2025-267.yaml", "https://github.com/tornadoweb/tornado/releases/tag/v6.5.3", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jhmp-mqwm-3gq8"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/tornadoweb/tornado/security-advisories/GHSA-jhmp-mqwm-3gq8", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/tornadoweb/tornado", "summary": "Tornado: Quadratic DoS via Crafted Multipart Parameters", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-20T18:57:56Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-jhmp-mqwm-3gq8", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "6.5.3", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "tornado"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 6.5.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Tornado: Quadratic DoS via Crafted Multipart Parameters
